input.content:
# generated: 2026-03-04
# project: Golden Image for AVD (Azure Virtual Desktop)
# project_key: NOKEY
# tracking_system: file-system
# story_location: _bmad-output/implementation-artifacts

# STATUS DEFINITIONS:
# ==================
# Epic Status:
#   - backlog: Epic not yet started
#   - in-progress: Epic actively being worked on
#   - done: All stories in epic completed
#
# Epic Status Transitions:
#   - backlog → in-progress: Automatically when first story is created (via create-story)
#   - in-progress → done: Manually when all stories reach 'done' status
#
# Story Status:
#   - backlog: Story only exists in epic file
#   - ready-for-dev: Story file created in stories folder
#   - in-progress: Developer actively working on implementation
#   - review: Implementation complete, ready for review
#   - done: Story completed
#
# Retrospective Status:
#   - optional: Can be completed but not required
#   - done: Retrospective has been completed
#
# WORKFLOW NOTES:
# ===============
# - Epic transitions to 'in-progress' automatically when first story is created
# - Stories can be worked in parallel if team capacity allows
# - SM typically creates next story after previous one is 'done' to incorporate learnings
# - Dev moves story to 'review', then runs code-review (fresh context, different LLM recommended)

generated: 2026-03-04
project: Golden Image for AVD (Azure Virtual Desktop)
project_key: NOKEY
tracking_system: file-system
story_location: _bmad-output/implementation-artifacts

development_status:
  # Epic 1: Secure Network Foundation
  epic-1: backlog
  1-1-provision-virtual-network-with-segmented-subnets: backlog
  1-2-deploy-network-security-groups-with-access-rules: backlog
  1-3-deploy-nat-gateway-and-public-ip-resources: backlog
  epic-1-retrospective: optional

  # Epic 2: Secure Access & Remote Management
  epic-2: backlog
  2-1-deploy-azure-bastion-host: backlog
  2-2-configure-ssh-key-management: backlog
  2-3-automate-bastion-connectivity-via-makefile: backlog
  epic-2-retrospective: optional

  # Epic 3: Golden Image Lifecycle
  epic-3: backlog
  3-1-provision-azure-compute-gallery: backlog
  3-2-manage-shared-image-versions-with-multi-region-replication: backlog
  epic-3-retrospective: optional

  # Epic 4: Compute Provisioning & DevOps Automation
  epic-4: backlog
  4-1-provision-linux-vm-from-golden-image: backlog
  4-2-implement-terraform-lifecycle-automation-and-state-management: backlog
  epic-4-retrospective: optional

input.command: python3 -c "import yaml; f=open('_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/sprint-status.yaml'); d=yaml.safe_load(f); print('Valid YAML'); print('Epics:', sum(1 for k in d['development_status'] if k.startswith('epic-') and not k.endswith('-retrospective'))); print('Stories:', sum(1 for k in d['development_status'] if not k.startswith('epic-'))); print('Retros:', sum(1 for k in d['development_status'] if k.endswith('-retrospective')))"

python3 -c "
import yaml
with open('_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/sprint-status.yaml') as f:
    d = yaml.safe_load(f)
ds = d['development_status']
epics = [k for k in ds if k.startswith('epic-') and not k.endswith('-retrospective')]
stories = [k for k in ds if not k.startswith('epic-')]
retros = [k for k in ds if k.endswith('-retrospective')]
print(f'Valid YAML: YES')
print(f'Epics: {len(epics)}')
print(f'Stories: {len(stories)}')
print(f'Retrospectives: {len(retros)}')
print(f'All statuses valid: {all(v in [\"backlog\",\"ready-for-dev\",\"in-progress\",\"review\",\"done\",\"optional\"] for v in ds.values())}')
"

import yaml

    d = yaml.safe_load(f)
ds = d['development_status']
epics = [k for k in ds if k.startswith('epic-') and not k.endswith('-retrospective')]
stories = [k for k in ds if not k.startswith('epic-')]
retros = [k for k in ds if k.endswith('-retrospective')]

print('Epics: ' + str(len(epics)))
print('Stories: ' + str(len(stories)))
print('Retrospectives: ' + str(len(retros)))
PYEOF

python3 /dev/stdin << 'EOF'
import yaml, sys
with open("_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/sprint-status.yaml") as f:
    d = yaml.safe_load(f)
ds = d["development_status"]
epics = [k for k in ds if k.startswith("epic-") and not k.endswith("-retrospective")]
stories = [k for k in ds if not k.startswith("epic-")]
retros = [k for k in ds if k.endswith("-retrospective")]
sys.stdout.write("Valid YAML: YES\n")
sys.stdout.write("Epics: %d\n" % len(epics))
sys.stdout.write("Stories: %d\n" % len(stories))
sys.stdout.write("Retrospectives: %d\n" % len(retros))
sys.stdout.flush()
EOF
input.description: Validate sprint status YAML using stdin
